subject: Port all tests to PostgreSQL and validate full functionality
description:
**Phase 10: Test Migration & Validation**

Port complete test suite (6,097 lines) to PostgreSQL:

**Tasks:**
- Port unit tests from SQLite to PostgreSQL
- Update integration tests for pgrx
- End-to-end tests: mentatd + pg_mentat + Datomic client
- Protocol compliance tests
- Concurrent client testing
- WASM function execution tests
- Performance regression tests

**Test categories:**
- Core datalog query tests
- Transaction processing tests
- Schema validation tests
- Index performance tests
- FTS tests (PostgreSQL tsvector)
- Temporal query tests
- Aggregate/rules tests
- WASM integration tests
- Datomic client compatibility tests

**Blocked by:** Task 18 (mentatd implementation)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All 6,097 test lines ported and passing
- Zero test failures
- PostgreSQL-specific edge cases covered
- Performance benchmarks documented
- Test coverage maintained or improved
